name: Blender Mango Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
FILLING:
2 1/2 tbsp. Gelatin
1 1/4 tbsp. Grated lemon rind
2 tbsp. Lemon juice
1/2 c. Boiling water
1/2 c. Sugar
3 Egg yolks
3/4 lb. Cream cheese
1 lb. Mashed mango pulp
1/2 c. Cold water
1 1/2 c. Sour cream
2/3 c. Milk
1. Mix the crushed graham crackers, coconut, cinnamon, and melted butter until combined.
2. Dissolve gelatin in boiling water using an electric blender for about 30 seconds.
3. Add lemon rind, lemon juice, and sugar to the blender; blend on high speed for another 30 seconds.
4. Incorporate egg yolks and softened cream cheese into the mixture; continue blending until well combined.
5. Stir in mango pulp (reserve some for topping), cold water, and sour cream until all ingredients are thoroughly mixed.
6. Pour the filling over the prepared crust and chill until firm.
7. Whip cream and gelatin separately, then fold into the reserved mango pulp.
8. Spread over the cake and serve. Serves 8.
(Note: This recipe was not attributed to a specific source.)
